name: @octopus/root
description: Octopus monorepo root governance package. Runtime members are added slice-by-slice after contracts and local design are frozen.

scripts.test:ts: pnpm --filter @octopus/schema-ts test && pnpm --filter @octopus/hub-client test && pnpm --filter @octopus/desktop test
scripts.build:ts: pnpm --filter @octopus/schema-ts build && pnpm --filter @octopus/hub-client build && pnpm --filter @octopus/desktop build
scripts.typecheck:ts: pnpm --filter @octopus/schema-ts typecheck && pnpm --filter @octopus/hub-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @octopus/desktop typecheck
